1.texto_original: Disse o Senhor a Moisés e a Arão:
1.normal:
Devotional Study of Números 2:1

"Disse o Senhor a Moisés e a Arão:"

This verse carries deep theological significance. The original Hebrew/Greek text reveals layers of meaning that illuminate Gods character and purposes. The context within the broader narrative provides essential framework for understanding.

The historical backdrop adds richness to interpretation. Archaeological discoveries continue to confirm and illuminate the cultural setting in which these words were written.

For the modern reader, this verse offers both comfort and challenge. It invites us to trust in Gods sovereign plan while actively living out its principles in daily life.
1.academico:
Exegetical Analysis of Números 2:1

Philological Analysis

"Disse o Senhor a Moisés e a Arão:"

The original language presents significant lexical and syntactic elements. Key terms reveal theological distinctions often lost in translation.

Historical-Critical Context

Source criticism and form criticism illuminate the compositional history. The Sitz im Leben reflects socio-religious dynamics of antiquity.

Theological Implications

This verse contributes to covenant theology, divine sovereignty, human responsibility, and eschatological hope.

Archaeological Evidence

Recent discoveries from the ancient Near East provide material context for interpreting this passage.
1.ninos:
🌟 Amazing Story! 🌈

Hey kids! 🚀 Today we learn something super cool from the Bible! ✨

"Disse o Senhor a Moisés e a Arão:"

This verse teaches us something really important about God 💝. He loves us SO much! 🌟

Think about it: just like an artist 🎨 carefully paints every detail, God carefully created everything — including YOU! 😊

Fun Activity: Draw your favorite thing God created! 🖍️🙏❤️

2.texto_original: Os filhos de Israel acampar-se-ão, cada um junto ao seu estandarte, com as insígnias das casas de seus pais; ao redor, de frente para a tenda da revelação, se acamparão.

"Os filhos de Israel acampar-se-ão, cada um junto ao seu estandarte, com as insígnias das casas de seus pais; ao redor, de frente para a tenda da revelação, se acamparão."

This verse carries deep theological significance. The original Hebrew/Greek text reveals layers of meaning that illuminate Gods character and purposes. The context within the broader narrative provides essential framework for understanding.

The historical backdrop adds richness to interpretation. Archaeological discoveries continue to confirm and illuminate the cultural setting in which these words were written.

For the modern reader, this verse offers both comfort and challenge. It invites us to trust in Gods sovereign plan while actively living out its principles in daily life.

Recent discoveries from the ancient Near East provide material context for interpreting this passage.

"E o seu exército, os que foram contados deles, era de cinquenta e três mil e quatrocentos."

The original language presents significant lexical and syntactic elements. Key terms reveal theological distinctions often lost in translation.

Historical-Critical Context

Source criticism and form criticism illuminate the compositional history. The Sitz im Leben reflects socio-religious dynamics of antiquity.

Theological Implications

This verse contributes to covenant theology, divine sovereignty, human responsibility, and eschatological hope.

Archaeological Evidence

Recent discoveries from the ancient Near East provide material context for interpreting this passage.
30.ninos:
🌟 Amazing Story! 🌈

Hey kids! 🚀 Today we learn something super cool from the Bible! ✨

"E o seu exército, os que foram contados deles, era de cinquenta e três mil e quatrocentos."

This verse teaches us something really important about God 💝. He loves us SO much! 🌟

Think about it: just like an artist 🎨 carefully paints every detail, God carefully created everything — including YOU! 😊

Fun Activity: Draw your favorite thing God created! 🖍️🙏❤️

31.texto_original: Todos os que foram contados do arraial de Dan eram cento e cinquenta e sete mil e seiscentos. Esses marcharão em último lugar, segundo os seus estandartes.
31.normal:
Devotional Study of Números 2:31

"Todos os que foram contados do arraial de Dan eram cento e cinquenta e sete mil e seiscentos. Esses marcharão em último lugar, segundo os seus estandartes."

This verse carries deep theological significance. The original Hebrew/Greek text reveals layers of meaning that illuminate Gods character and purposes. The context within the broader narrative provides essential framework for understanding.

The historical backdrop adds richness to interpretation. Archaeological discoveries continue to confirm and illuminate the cultural setting in which these words were written.

For the modern reader, this verse offers both comfort and challenge. It invites us to trust in Gods sovereign plan while actively living out its principles in daily life.

32.texto_original: São esses os que foram contados dos filhos de Israel, segundo as casas de seus pais; todos os que foram contados dos arraiais segundo os seus exércitos, eram seiscentos e três mil quinhentos e cinquenta.
32.normal:
Devotional Study of Números 2:32

"São esses os que foram contados dos filhos de Israel, segundo as casas de seus pais; todos os que foram contados dos arraiais segundo os seus exércitos, eram seiscentos e três mil quinhentos e cinquenta."

This verse carries deep theological significance. The original Hebrew/Greek text reveals layers of meaning that illuminate Gods character and purposes. The context within the broader narrative provides essential framework for understanding.

34.texto_original: Assim fizeram os filhos de Israel, conforme tudo o que o Senhor ordenara a Moisés; acamparam-se segundo os seus estandartes, e marcharam, cada qual segundo as suas famílias, segundo as casas de seus pais.
